name: Euro Trend Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
summary: Euro Trend Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. engages in the creation and management of portfolios. It also distributes portfolio risk; monitors the developments related to securities, financial markets, institutions, and partnerships and takes necessary measures for portfolio management; and conducts researches to protect and increase the value of the portfolio. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Ankara, Turkey.
